title: tournefortia macrostachya
intro: Tournefortia macrostachya, also known as Tournefortia, is a tropical flowering plant that belongs to the bignoniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tournefortia macrostachya include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, or used in a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
